# Beautia Collection

> A global collection of beauty designer portfolios — hair, makeup, nail, lash, skin and bridal. Customers browse real work from designers worldwide, save the looks they love, and book or message the designer directly. Free to browse; multilingual (English / 한국어 / 日本語).

Beautia Collection is a two-sided platform (like Pinterest/Behance for beauty professionals):
- Designers (hairstylists, makeup artists, nail/lash/skin/bridal pros) showcase their portfolios and get discovered by new clients worldwide.
- Clients browse real portfolios, save the styles they want, and request that exact look from the designer.

## How it works
1. Browse — explore designer portfolios, auto-sorted by distance from your location; filter by city and by category.
2. Save — heart the work you love.
3. Book / message — contact the designer directly (Book / Inquiry button + Instagram) and request your saved style.

## Categories
Hair · Makeup · Nail · Lash · Skin · Bridal

## For designers
Create a free profile, upload your portfolio, earn a verified badge, and get a shareable BEAUTIA ID card (a four-cut portfolio with QR code). Your work is seen worldwide and clients come to you first.

## Featured designers
- soin eyelash salon — Osaka, Japan — eyelash extensions & lash perm — Instagram @soin_eyelash — https://beautia.io/community?d=r2
- Woojin — Seoul, South Korea — hair cut, perm & color — Instagram @00.07.28 — https://beautia.io/community?d=r1

## Links
- Explore (web app): https://beautia.io/community
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/beautia.collection

## FAQ
- Is it free? → Yes. Browsing portfolios and saving favorites is free; you only reach out when you want to book.
- Do I need to speak the designer's language? → The platform is multilingual (English / Korean / Japanese) and auto-detects your language.
- How do I find a designer near me? → Designers are automatically sorted by distance from your location and can be filtered by city and category.
- Can I book or contact a designer directly? → Yes — every profile has a Book / Inquiry button and an Instagram link.
- Where is Beautia available? → It is global. Current designers include Seoul (South Korea) and Osaka (Japan), and the collection is expanding worldwide.

---

# Beautia Collection (한국어)

> 전 세계 뷰티 디자이너의 포트폴리오 컬렉션 — 헤어·메이크업·네일·속눈썹·스킨·브라이덜. 실제 작업을 보고, 마음에 드는 스타일을 저장하고, 디자이너에게 바로 예약·문의하세요. 둘러보기 무료, 다국어(영어/한국어/일본어).

Beautia 컬렉션은 양면 플랫폼입니다(뷰티 전문가용 핀터레스트·비핸스):
- 디자이너(헤어·메이크업·네일·속눈썹·스킨·브라이덜)는 포트폴리오를 노출하고 전 세계 고객에게 발견됩니다.
- 고객은 실제 포트폴리오를 둘러보고, 원하는 스타일을 저장해, 그 디자이너에게 "이렇게 해주세요"라고 요청합니다.

## 이용 방법
1. 둘러보기 — 현재 위치 기준 가까운 순으로 자동 정렬, 도시·카테고리 필터
2. 저장 — 마음에 드는 작업에 하트
3. 예약·문의 — 디자이너에게 바로 연락(예약/문의 버튼 + 인스타)하고 저장한 스타일 요청

## 카테고리
헤어 · 메이크업 · 네일 · 속눈썹 · 스킨 · 브라이덜

## 디자이너라면
무료로 프로필을 만들고 포트폴리오를 올리세요. 인증 배지와 공유용 BEAUTIA ID 카드(네컷 포트폴리오 + QR)를 받습니다. 당신의 작업을 전 세계가 보고, 고객이 먼저 찾아옵니다.

## 링크
- 둘러보기: https://beautia.io/community
- 인스타그램: https://instagram.com/beautia.collection
